arts.ttl: Aston Villa and PSG reach agreement over Marco Asensio’s loan deal
arts.sum: Aston Villa and PSG have reached an agreement this Saturday regarding Marco Asensio’s (29) loan move to the Premier League side, according to RMC Sport’s Fabrice Hawkins. The Spaniard will…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa, Arsenal Face Setback as Wolves Extend €70M-Rated PSG Target
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha has quickly established himself as a key player for Wolverhampton Wanderers, showcasing his versatility by excelling in various attacking roles. Whether playing as an attacking midfielder, supporting striker, or center-forward, the Brazilian has adapted with ease. His strong performances have caught the attention of top clubs like Arsenal, Chelsea, and Paris Saint-Germain, according […] The post Aston Villa, Arsenal Face Setback as Wolves Extend €70M-Rated PSG Target appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Reveals Aston Villa’s Interest in Loan Deal for €25M-Rated PSG Outcast
arts.sum: With the January transfer window now open, Paris Saint-Germain are looking to offload players who no longer fit into their plans—Marco Asensio being one of them. Since November 30, Asensio’s role has gradually diminished. The former Real Madrid star has fallen out of the starting lineup and has made only a few appearances off the […] The post Fabrizio Romano Reveals Aston Villa’s Interest in Loan Deal for €25M-Rated PSG Outcast appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembélé Joins Real Madrid Legend in Impressive Feat After Second Straight Hat-Trick
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain and Stade Brestois clashed on Saturday night as a preview of their UEFA Champions League knockout playoff tie with the Parisians securing a 5-2 victory at Stade Francis Le Blé. Once criticized for his erratic finishing, Ousmane Dembélé has reinvented himself as a prolific goal scorer in 2025. Since the start of the […] The post Ousmane Dembélé Joins Real Madrid Legend in Impressive Feat After Second Straight Hat-Trick appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Another hat trick for Dembélé as Ligue 1 leader PSG wins at Brest
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé scored a second straight hat trick as runaway Ligue 1 leader Paris Saint-Germain won at Brest 5-2 to move 13 points ahead of Marseille on Saturday. Brest also made a mess of a long ball six minutes later and it found Dembélé, who tucked it away from the edge of the penalty area.

arts.ttl: Marco Asensio set for Aston Villa loan as PSG part ways with Cher Ndour
arts.sum: Aston Villa are leading the race to sign PSG striker Marco Asensio (29) on loan, according to L’Equipe and Foot Mercato. To ratify the Spaniard’s loan to the Villains, Les…

arts.ttl: Madrid close out league phase with a win over Brest thanks to Rodrygo's brace
arts.sum: Our boys delivered a disciplined display from the first minute, and headed into the half-time break one goal to the good following Rodrygo's beautiful solo effort. Real Madrid were dominant from that point until the break, though Brest did come close with Balde's volley that was too high on 37 minutes, and a long ball by Magnetti, which took a deflection and almost caught Courtois out on 42’.
